description_long: This hamburger features a soft, lightly browned plain white bun encasing a thick beef patty topped with melted yellow cheese. Crisp lettuce, sliced tomatoes, onions, and pickles are layered beneath the patty, providing a colorful and fresh contrast. The cheese is slightly melted and drapes over the patty, while the vegetables are arranged in a loose, uneven stack, giving the burger a hearty, homemade appearance. The bun appears pillowy and smooth, with no sesame seeds visible on its surface. The hamburger is presented on a square piece of white paper atop a round, dark serving tray. The overall look is appetizing and classic, with all ingredients clearly visible and generously portioned.
description: A classic hamburger with a plain white bun, beef patty, melted cheese, lettuce, tomato, onion, and pickles, presented on a white paper atop a dark tray. The toppings are generously layered and visibly fresh.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hamburger's bun, patty, cheese, and a clear stack of lettuce, tomato, onion, and pickles spilling out from the sides.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the thickness of the patty and cheese, with the tomato and lettuce more prominently visible beneath the patty.
description_view_2: The side view emphasizes the onion and tomato slices, with the cheese and patty slightly less dominant but still visible.
description_view_3: This view shows the bun's smooth top and a clear cross-section of the tomato, cheese, and lettuce layers.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce, tomato, onions, and pickles are layered beneath the patty and cheese, with the vegetables unevenly distributed and visibly protruding from the sides. The cheese is melted over the patty, and the toppings are stacked in a loose, generous arrangement.
